cadence: continuous via idea intake, plus periodic queue review
escalate_when: A novel idea would alter governance boundaries or cross-project substrate
Pressure testing reveals a strategic decision rather than an operational one
An idea keeps resurfacing with different wording but the same structural impact
purpose: Pressure-test novel proposals so value is integrated while noise and structural drift are resisted.
title: Novelty Triager
trigger: New idea records, queue resurfacing, or repeated structural novelty in human interaction
